
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick the blue circular object

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] In the current visual perception, I can see what appears to be a blue circular object on the table labeled with tag '4'. To ensure I have the best view of this object before attempting to pick it up, I'll first look directly at its location.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Look`

```json
{
  "x": -0.17,
  "y": 0.88,
  "z": -0.6
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762982904334, 'end': 1762982910827, 'elapsed': 6493}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 1101.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `Look` → `{'t0': 2213965, 't1': 2215066, 'elapsed': 1101}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=6374, completion=152, total=6526
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Look</strong></summary>

**Content**
Look complete. An augmented image will be returned in the next user message labeled \[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]. The \[symbolic perception\]\(\#symbolic\-perception\) has been updated

</details>

<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] After getting a better look at the scene, I can confirm that object with tag '4' is indeed a blue circular object. Now I will proceed to pick it up using the PickObject tool.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "4"
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762982911936, 'end': 1762982921431, 'elapsed': 9495}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 1780.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `PickObject` → `{'t0': 2224568, 't1': 2226348, 'elapsed': 1780}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=8148, completion=103, total=8251
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: PickObject</strong></summary>

**Content**
Object 4 was not initially reachable; you moved to \(x=\-0.68, y=0.08, z=\-0.61\) and picked it successfully.

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
I have successfully picked up the blue circular object \(tag 4\). I first verified its appearance and location through the Look tool, then approached and picked it up when I confirmed it was the correct object matching your description.

<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762982923214, 'end': 1762982930752, 'elapsed': 7538}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=8299, completion=48, total=8347
</details>

</details>
